title: Project

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

is_active.description: `True` if the project is active, `False` if the project is not active.

company.description: The subsidiary that the project belongs to.

contact.description: The supplier, or customer involved in the project.

description:
# The Project Object
### Description
The `Project` object is used to track and manage time, costs, resources, and revenue for specific initiatives or work efforts.
It provides classification on transactions for allocating expenses, revenue, and activities to a specific project for financial reporting.

### Usage Example
Fetch from the `GET Project` endpoint and view project information.
